name: Case Study
history: Forms close relationships with friends who experience significant stressors. A friend is dealing with academic pressures and parenting an autistic child.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't show enough concern, people will think I don't care and will leave me.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough to maintain relationships.
coping_strategies: Avoids confrontation and tries to be overly accommodating to avoid conflict.
situation: Considering visiting a friend managing parenting demands and housing instability.
auto_thought: If I don't visit, my friend will think I don't care and will distance themselves from me.
behavior: Overextends self to meet perceived expectations of others.
